item.title: Attacker to Victim Rule Validation
item.description: Summary This scenario validates a simple but useful firewall workflow: one host attempts to reach another host through OPNsense, the firewall rule set decides the outcome, and the result is verified in logs.

item.title: OPNsense Firewall Lab
item.description: Summary This project documents a small OPNsense lab built to practise firewalling, segmentation thinking, and basic security monitoring.

item.title: Wazuh FIM Validation
item.description: Summary This scenario validates one simple Wazuh File Integrity Monitoring alert from beginning to end. The point is not to simulate a breach.

item.title: Home SOC Lab
item.description: Summary This project is a small home SOC lab built to show practical security monitoring rather than product installation.

item.title: Microsoft 365 Endpoint Support
item.description: Summary This project is a deliberately small Microsoft 365 endpoint support lab built for learning, portfolio use, and interview discussion.

item.title: Core Services Map
item.description: Core Services Map Summary This note maps the main service roles inside the homelab.

item.title: Homelab Network Topology
item.description: Homelab Network Topology Summary This note explains the network layout behind the lab environment.

item.title: Homelab Concepts
item.description: Summary This section is for the mental models behind the lab environment.

item.title: Homelab
item.description: Summary This section contains notes about my personal lab environment, infrastructure layout, services, and experiments that support security, cloud, and administration learning.

item.title: Detection Validation and Rule Tuning Workflow
item.description: Detection Validation and Rule Tuning Workflow Summary This note describes a simple workflow for validating a detection and tuning it when the result is weak, noisy, or unclear.
